ol.li: Return value popped first - before frame manipulation
locals_top restored - to frame->locals_base before pop
Frame popped - after locals_top is saved
Return value pushed last - onto caller's operand stack

div.p: Before RETURN (in callee frame) Callee Frame: locals_base: 3 locals_count: 2 locals: [3, 4] Operand Stack: [99.0, 42.0] ↓ return_value = vm_pop() → 42.0 ↓ frame_stack_pop() removes callee frame ↓ After RETURN (in caller frame) Caller Frame: locals_base: 0 locals_count: 3 locals: [0, 1, 2] Operand Stack: [99.0, 42.0] ↑ Return value successfully transferred to caller's context!
